name: Bendy MOTM
description:
Giving him a chance to feel pretty because he doesn't deserve all the Ls he's getting rn

He's wearing a dress for the first time in forever and he doesn't feel pretty

Don't worry Bendy I still think you're pretty 😍 Don't listen to the haters.

I can't stand hoes that hate Bendy over the Dyle thing

I love how majestic I draw characters on paper
